component.name: pagination
component.description: Navigation bar for paginated content. Composite assembly of nav buttons and page-number items. Supports LTR/RTL, three sizes, and current-page indication.

subcomponent.name: _pagination-item
subcomponent.description: Internal page-number item. Prefixed with _ — not for standalone use.

implementation_notes: RTL axis implemented via [dir='rtl'] on the <nav> element. Flexbox order reverses automatically. Arrow icons flip via transform: scaleX(-1).
Selector layer (Current Page bottom indicator) is a 3px bar converted to ::after pseudo-element on .pagination__item[aria-current='page'].
Focus ring uses CSS outline (not border) to prevent layout shift. outline-offset: 0 matches Figma inset appearance.
Overflow/ellipsis items render as <span class='pagination__item pagination__item--overflow'> — non-interactive, aria-hidden='true'.
Navigation buttons are minimal wrappers. Full interactive states (hover, focus, pressed) defer to Button component.
Figma typo 'Focsed' corrected to 'focused' in all CSS and documentation.
Figma typo 'Meduim' corrected to 'medium' in all CSS modifiers and documentation.
Pressed and Disabled states are not defined in Figma. Added as best-practice CSS with TODO tokens.
Medium item indicator bottom is set to 0 instead of Figma's 2.5px (sub-pixel rendering inconsistency — see analysis.md Intentional Deviations).
All component-level --pagination-* tokens are missing from token.css. Fallback values are used. See analysis.md Missing Tokens.
